Para atualizar a base de Armazéns Cadast: To update the SICARM Registered Warehouses database, simply close this pop-up and click the 'Download Data from Conab' button.
Preencha o código de segurança e clique: Fill in the security code and click 'Consultar'.
O sistema consultará automaticamente a b: The system will automatically consult the SICARM database to fill the 'Reception Capacity' column.
Os seguintes CDAs do seu arquivo não tiv: The following CDAs in your file did not have their 'Reception Capacity' found in the updated SICARM (Conab) database, and were therefore set to 0:
Selecione quais tipos de armazém podem a: Select which warehouse types can store each product. Click the cell to check (☑) or uncheck (☐).
Você precisa adicionar produtos na aba ': You need to add products in the 'Supply' tab and load the base in the 'Warehouses' tab before proceeding.
Você precisa adicionar pelo menos um pro: You need to add at least one product in the 'Supply' tab before proceeding.
Você precisa carregar a base de dados na: You need to load the database in the 'Warehouses' tab before proceeding.
Valores para armazenamento de cada produ: Storage values for each product. The system will search for the exact product name (ignoring accents and case). If not found, it will use the 'Outros' (Others) row tariff. The 'Outros' row is mandatory and will be automatically created with a value of 50 if it doesn't exist in a new file. Table updates will be saved automatically.
Valores de frete por tonelada e km para: Freight values per ton and km for each state. Table updates will be saved automatically.
Calcula a distância rodoviária real entr: Calculates the real road distance between each origin city (Supply) and each warehouse (Warehouses).
Clique no botão abaixo para iniciar o cá: Click the button below to start the calculation. This may take a few seconds depending on the amount of data.
Clique em uma célula da tabela para visu: Click on a table cell to visualize the route on the map below.
Clique na tabela acima para visualizar a: Click on the table above to visualize the desired route. Only one route can be viewed at a time. In cases where the route is displayed as a red straight line, it indicates the real route could not be calculated, possibly because the point is outside Brazil or in an isolated area with no roads within a 50 km radius. In these cases, the distance displayed in the table is the geodesic distance (straight line) between the points, not the actual road distance.
Dados de entrada ou armazéns não encontr: Input data or warehouses not found. Check the previous tabs.

Aumente a carga máxima de recepção diári: Increase the maximum daily reception load or the allocation days in the model configuration.
Quantidade de dias que multiplica as rec: Number of days that multiplies the warehouse's receptions (minimum and maximum), simulating more than one day of operation.

Otimiza a alocação de produtos para os a: Optimizes the allocation of products to available warehouses based on distance and capacity.
A soma de todas as rotas chegando em um: The sum of all routes arriving at a warehouse must be at least this value daily. This rule only applies if the warehouse is used.
Aumente a capacidade estática dos armazé: Increase the static capacity of the warehouses used in the tab
Se estiver usando a capacidade do banco: If using database capacity, make sure the chosen warehouses have sufficient reception values in the database.

Habilite novos armazéns na aba: Enable new warehouses in the tab
Os valores de custo total e outras métri: The total cost values and other exact metrics displayed on this page should be disregarded. To prevent the model from becoming
Ativar esta opção incluirá a construção: Enabling this option will include the detailed construction of the mathematical model (in Python) in the log. However, this may significantly increase the resolution time. Use this option only for debugging or if you want to understand how the model is built.

Distribua melhor a oferta entre outros a: Better distribute the supply among other enabled warehouses.
Se ativado, utiliza a capacidade de rece: If enabled, uses the reception capacity (t) of the warehouses registered in the database as the maximum daily reception.
Defina a compatibilidade. Indique quais: Set the compatibility. Indicate which warehouse types can store each product type by checking or unchecking the boxes in the table.
Ative para configurar limites de recepçã: Enable to configure reception limits and route limits. Using these limits can help create more realistic solutions, but can also considerably increase the model's resolution time.

Reduza a quantidade ofertada na aba: Reduce the quantity offered in the tab
Existem ofertas não alocadas porque as r: There are unallocated supplies because freight restrictions (minimum or maximum load per trip) made it impossible to fully flow this load to any valid destination.
Os custos totais sofreram penalização al: Total costs suffered a very high penalty for unallocated supply. When a freight route is tied between a minimum and a maximum, leftovers that do not form a viable truck or large unabsorbed volumes are penalized instead of transported.
Selecione uma rota na tabela para ver os: Select a route in the table to see the individual details.
Os valores de custo total exibidos nesta: The total cost values displayed on this page should be disregarded. To prevent the model from becoming
A oferta excedeu a capacidade de armazen: The supply exceeded the storage capacity of the warehouses. There is no calculation error, but rather a physical limitation in the storage infrastructure available for the used warehouses.
Lembre-se da diferença entre Capacidade: Remember the difference between Local vs. Global Capacity: Merely summing the total capacity of all enabled warehouses does not guarantee operational viability. If a warehouse has plenty of empty space but a very narrow 'entry door' (daily reception) or freight constraints that force incompatible shipments, the model might be forced to exceed the physical capacity of another warehouse to move the cargo and avoid leaving trucks idle.
Suposições do Modelo e Atenção aos Resul: Model Assumptions and Attention to Results:
Estes avisos refletem as escolhas matemá: These warnings reflect the mathematical choices the model had to make to bypass logistical bottlenecks. To prevent the system from becoming 'unsolvable' and to show exactly where the operation 'jams', the model preferred to use artificial storage capacity (as if renting an emergency extra warehouse) with an exorbitantly high cost/penalty. Therefore, the total cost values displayed here should be ignored until the bottleneck is resolved.
Verifique se as restrições de Frete Míni: Check if Minimum Freight constraints are not forcing the shipment of loads larger than the warehouse can receive at once.
Interações complexas de regras: A recepç: Complex rule interactions: Reception acts as the 'entry door' of the warehouse. Even if there is plenty of internal space (static capacity) left, if the speed at which the warehouse can receive trucks is too low, a bottleneck will occur. Furthermore, if there are strict 'Minimum Freight' rules, the model may prefer to burst this 'entry door' to ensure trucks do not travel empty.
Estes avisos não são erros de cálculo, m: These warnings are not calculation errors, but reflections of physical limitations in your operation. To prevent the model from becoming 'unsolvable', the system preferred to 'force the entry' of the cargo using artificial reception capacity with an exorbitantly high cost (penalty). Therefore, the total cost values displayed on this page should be ignored until the issue is resolved.
Aumente a carga máxima de recepção diári: Increase the maximum daily reception load or the number of working days in the model configuration to 'widen the entry door'.
Distribua melhor a oferta entre outros a: Better distribute the supply among other enabled warehouses that have faster reception.
Verifique se as restrições de 'Carga mín: Check if 'Minimum freight load' constraints are not forcing the shipment of very large volumes at once to warehouses with slow reception.
Interações complexas de regras: Esse tip: Complex rule interactions: This type of alert occurs when data conflicts. For example, if your remaining supply is 10 tons, but you configured that a truck only travels if it has at least 30 tons (Minimum Freight), this remaining 10 tons will be stuck at the origin. The same happens if a warehouse can only receive 15 tons per day, but your minimum truck carries 30 tons: the model cannot make the delivery without breaking a rule.
Não se trata de um erro no sistema, mas: It is not a system error, but a logistical dead end. In these situations, instead of delivering nothing, the model assumes that this problematic cargo simply could not be allocated and applies a very high penalty (fine) to the total cost. Disregard the displayed costs until you adjust the limits.
Reduza a exigência de 'Carga mínima de f: Reduce the 'Minimum freight load' requirement in the model configuration to allow emptier trucks to transport the leftovers.
Certifique-se de que as quantidades ofer: Ensure that the total supplied quantities are multiples of or compatible with the established load limits.
Verifique se os armazéns de destino poss: Check if the destination warehouses have enough 'Daily Reception Capacity' to receive at least one full truck of the minimum required size.
Capacidade Local vs. Global: Somar a cap: Local vs. Global Capacity: Summing the total capacity of all warehouses does not guarantee viability. If a warehouse has empty space but has daily reception or freight restrictions that force incompatible shipments, the model may be forced to exceed the physical capacity of another warehouse to move the cargo.
Estes avisos refletem escolhas matemátic: These warnings reflect mathematical choices the model had to make to bypass logistical bottlenecks. To avoid the system becoming 'unsolvable' and to show where the operation stalls, the model used an artificial capacity with an exorbitantly high cost (penalty). Therefore, the total cost values displayed on this page should be disregarded until the issue is resolved.
Verifique se as restrições de 'Carga mín: Check if the 'Minimum freight load' restrictions are not forcing the dispatch of loads larger than the warehouse can receive.
Interações de regras: Mesmo que haja mui: Rule interactions: Even if there is plenty of internal space (static capacity) remaining, if the daily reception rate is insufficient, a bottleneck will occur. Furthermore, if there are strict 'Minimum Freight' rules, the model may prefer to exceed this daily reception to ensure trucks do not travel empty.
Aumente a carga máxima de recepção diári: Increase the maximum daily reception load or the number of business days in the model configuration.
Verifique se as restrições de 'Carga mín: Check if the 'Minimum freight load' restrictions are not forcing the dispatch of very large volumes at once.
Interações de regras: Isso ocorre quando: Rule interactions: This occurs when data conflicts. For example, if the remaining supply is 10t, but the Minimum Freight requirement is 30t, the 10t cannot be sent. The same happens if a warehouse can only receive 15t daily, but the minimum truck carries 30t: the model cannot make the delivery without breaking a restriction.
Reduza a exigência de 'Carga mínima de f: Reduce the 'Minimum freight load' requirement in the model configuration to allow leftovers to be transported.
Certifique-se de que as quantidades ofer: Ensure that the total quantities offered are compatible with the established load limits.
Verifique se os armazéns de destino poss: Check if the destination warehouses have enough 'Daily Reception Capacity' to receive at least one truck of the minimum required size.
O modelo gerou um número elevado de rota: The model generated a high number of performed routes (> 150).
Desenhar todas essas rotas no mapa simul: Drawing all these routes on the map simultaneously can take considerable time or even cause your browser to crash.
É recomendável que você exporte o Relató: It is recommended that you export the Full Report (Excel) to save the results. You can also view individual routes on the map by selecting the corresponding cells in the table.

Selecione uma rota na tabela ao lado par: Select a route in the table beside to see the details and indicators here.
O sistema calcula todas as rotas possíve: The system calculates all possible routes between the origin cities and the available warehouses. Click 'Calculate Distance Matrix' to begin and wait for completion. Subsequently, you may also visualize any route directly on the interactive map below the table.

Aumente a capacidade estática dos armazé: Increase the static capacity of the warehouses used in the 'Warehouses' tab.
Habilite novos armazéns na aba 'Produto: Enable new warehouses in the 'Product and Warehouses' tab to better distribute the load.
Reduza a quantidade ofertada na aba 'Ofe: Reduce the quantity offered in the 'Supply' tab.
Os valores de custo total exibidos nesta: The total cost values displayed on this page should be disregarded. To prevent the system from failing completely, an artificial flow route ('unallocated') was created with an exorbitantly high unit cost (penalty) for these isolated cities. Resolve the lack of routes below and run the model again to obtain the real costs.
Diminua as exigências de 'Carga mínima d: Decrease the 'Minimum freight load' requirements in the model configuration to allow smaller volumes to be shipped.
Aumente a 'Carga máxima de frete' para q: Increase the 'Maximum freight load' so that flow occurs in fewer trips and fits the fleet.
Aplica o Princípio de Pareto (Regra 80/2: Applies the Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule) by filtering only the top 20% best routes (shortest) from each origin. This significantly speeds up the mathematical model's resolution time. Warning: if supply and demand are very tight, this restriction may prevent the model from finding an optimal solution, as alternative routes outside the top 20% have been discarded.
Bem-vindo ao GranumDSS! Este aplicativo: Welcome to GranumDSS! This application was developed to optimize the allocation of products in warehouses, minimizing freight and storage costs. Follow the 1 to 7 flow in the tabs to get the operation results:
Insira a quantidade de produtos disponív: Enter the quantity of products available by city (supply). You can upload an Excel/CSV spreadsheet or manually add and edit the data. The coordinates (latitude and longitude) are automatically filled in when you select a city.
Gerencie os armazéns que receberão os pr: Manage the warehouses that will receive the products. A standard base is loaded automatically, but you can view and update this list by downloading the latest data from Conab or by uploading a custom spreadsheet.
Configure as tarifas de armazenamento (p: Configure the storage tariffs (public and private) for each product and the freight value (ton/km) for each state. You can use default values or insert new ones, and changes in the tables are saved automatically.
Configure as restrições da operação (com: Configure the operation constraints (such as reception limits, freight rules, and use of the Pareto Principle) and run the mathematical optimization model.
Visualize as métricas globais da operaçã: View the global operation metrics, explore the suggested routes on the interactive map, and download the full final report (Excel).
